# Best AI Tools for Facebook Ads in 2026

Facebook ads can be incredibly effective but also time-consuming to manage. AI tools help you create better ads that get better results!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Ad Copy That Converts

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] helps you create compelling Facebook ad copy quickly.

### Rytr for Facebook Ads
- **Ad templates**: Ready-to-use ad formats that work
- **Multiple variations**: Test different angles
- **CTA optimization**: Write compelling calls to action

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## [[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]]: Fast Ad Creatives

[[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]] helps you create stunning Facebook ad visuals without design skills.

### Canva for Facebook Ads
- **Facebook templates**: Perfectly sized for Facebook
- **Magic Edit**: Modify designs with text prompts
- **Brand kit**: Keep your look consistent

**Try Canva**: https://canva.com
